person.title: Projects Director | PMO & Project Controls Executive | Telecommunications & Digital Infrastructure Leader
person.address: 8 Tawhid St., El Magzar El Ally St., El Maroitia St., El Haram, Giza
person.tagline: 25+ years of international programme and project leadership delivering telecommunications, digital infrastructure and capital investment programmes across Saudi Arabia, Egypt and Sudan.

executiveProfile.summary: PMP®-certified Projects Director and PMO Executive with more than 25 years of international leadership experience delivering telecommunications, digital infrastructure and capital investment programmes across Saudi Arabia, Egypt and Sudan. Experienced in PMO governance, project controls, commercial management, stakeholder leadership and executive reporting. Recognised for combining strategic leadership with deep expertise in FTTH, FTTx, OSP, ISP, fibre optic infrastructure, low-current systems and digital transformation. Extensive experience leading multidisciplinary teams, managing complex project portfolios and supporting executive decision-making through governance frameworks, KPI dashboards and business process optimisation.
keyHighlights: 25+ years of international programme and project leadership
PMP® certified executive with PMO, governance and project controls expertise
10+ years supporting Saudi Telecom Company (STC) fixed network programmes
Leadership across Saudi Arabia, Egypt and Sudan
Expert in FTTH, FTTx, OSP, ISP, 5G and Low Current Systems
ERP development, KPI dashboards and digital transformation
Commercial, cost, schedule, quality and risk management

pmo.description: Over 10 years of PMO leadership experience supporting large-scale telecom programmes. Expert in establishing PMO frameworks, governance structures, reporting dashboards, and project controls.

projectControls.description: Senior Project Controls professional with expertise in planning, scheduling, cost control, risk management and change control for major telecom and infrastructure programmes.

telecommunications.description: Deep technical expertise in telecommunications with specific focus on FTTH, FTTx, OSP, ISP, 5G and fiber optic infrastructure across major national programmes.

digitalTransformation.description: Experienced in digital transformation, ERP development, KPI dashboard creation and business process optimisation.
